hooks.command: path=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$path" in */apps/backend/*.ts) if [ -d apps/backend/node_modules ]; then npx --prefix apps/backend jest --findRelatedTests "$path" --passWithNoTests --silent; else echo "[hook:PostToolUse] backend skip — pnpm install not run"; fi ;; */apps/customer-web/*.tsx) if [ -d apps/customer-web/node_modules ]; then npx --prefix apps/customer-web vitest related "$path" --run --passWithNoTests; else echo "[hook:PostToolUse] customer-web skip — pnpm install not run"; fi ;; */apps/admin-console/*.tsx) if [ -d apps/admin-console/node_modules ]; then npx --prefix apps/admin-console vitest related "$path" --run --passWithNoTests; else echo "[hook:PostToolUse] admin-console skip — pnpm install not run"; fi ;; esac

if [ -d apps/backend/node_modules ]; then cd apps/backend && npm run build --silent 2>&1 | tail -5 && npm test --silent -- --passWithNoTests; else echo '[hook:Stop] backend skipped — run pnpm install first'; fi

if [ -d apps/customer-web/node_modules ]; then cd apps/customer-web && npm run build --silent 2>&1 | tail -5 && npm run test -- --run --passWithNoTests --silent; else echo '[hook:Stop] customer-web skipped — run pnpm install first'; fi

if [ -d apps/admin-console/node_modules ]; then cd apps/admin-console && npm run build --silent 2>&1 | tail -5 && npm run test -- --run --passWithNoTests --silent; else echo '[hook:Stop] admin-console skipped — run pnpm install first'; fi
